'''Gannesa juice''' was a juice that was [[Diet/Legends|potable]] by [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolans]].<ref name="TFJP" /> Around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">Gannesa juice's mention in "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]" takes place a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the part of the story that is concurrent with {{Film|VI}}, the events of which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> the Ortolan [[Music/Legends|musician]] [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] excitedly anticipated a dinner at which gannesa juice would be served. However, he ultimately received neither the dinner nor the juice.<ref name="TFJP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gannesa juice was mentioned in "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," a short story written by [[John Gregory Betancourt]] and published in the ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' story collection in [[1995]].<ref name="TFJP" />
